hooks.name: todo-tracker
hooks.description: Todo tracker for Kiro agents. After every agent turn (Stop), update .kiro/plan/TODO.md with completed and pending tasks so progress is always visible.

action.prompt: Review the work completed in this turn. Update the file .kiro/plan/TODO.md with two sections: '## Completed' and '## Pending'. Move any tasks that were finished this turn into Completed (with a checkmark). Add any new tasks you discovered into Pending. Keep entries as concise one-liners. If TODO.md already exists, read it first and update it incrementally instead of overwriting. Do not modify any other files.
